idea-plugin.name: Maven Project Helper
idea-plugin.description: Manage versions, builds, dependencies, and Git synchronization across a Maven workspace from IntelliJ IDEA.
idea-plugin.change-notes:
Initial IntelliJ IDEA release

Maven Project Helper brings multi-repository Maven workspace management directly into IntelliJ IDEA. It is designed for teams that develop many related services, libraries, parents, and modules together.

Workspace insight

  • Discover linked Maven projects and modules from IntelliJ's Maven model.
  • Inspect workspace-only dependencies and dependents, with direct navigation to their POM files.
  • Explore an interactive dependency graph with project focus, zoom controls, and PNG export.
  • Calculate repository build stages, identify cycles, and export the build order to Excel.
  • Inspect searchable dependency trees and export CycloneDX SBOMs as JSON or XML.

Version management

  • Update a project version together with references in dependent workspace projects.
  • Apply or remove upgrade prefixes across multiple projects and realign linked versions.
  • Update dependent projects directly from the POM editor context menu.
  • Inspect managed version properties and coordinate Spring Boot upgrades.
  • Read released versions from Git tags while respecting the local Maven and Git environment.

Build and Git workflows

  • Build selected repositories or individual modules with configurable Maven options and live output.
  • Open or build any project from the MPH tool-window context menu.
  • View branch names and ahead/behind status for every repository.
  • Create coordinated feature branches across multiple repositories.
  • Synchronize upgrade branches with develop using stash, rebase, restore, and safe version realignment.

Security and supply chain

  • Run Nexus IQ evaluations for repositories and modules using existing Jenkins pipeline application IDs.
  • Inspect policy violations, severity summaries, remediation guidance, and full Nexus IQ reports.
  • Keep credentials in IntelliJ's secure password storage and reuse local Maven configuration.

Thank you for trying the first IntelliJ IDEA release of Maven Project Helper. Feedback and issue reports are welcome on GitHub.

action.description: Find linked Maven projects that reference this project
